changes: Overview: new "Show LOADOUT widget" toggle (Game appearance section). The in-game LOADOUT pill is now hidden by default — flip the toggle to show it; it appears/disappears live, and Auto Jobs' automatic software/hardware management keeps working either way.

LOADOUT pill: drag it anywhere — free drag with snap spots (next to Notifications, beside the app launcher bar with a matching dock skin, hanging under the account HUD, or any custom spot on the bottom edge). The position is remembered.

Auto Jobs: fixed mislabeled jobs the site ships — a job NAMED "Data download" that actually requires decrypting the downloaded file is now recognised by its underlying type and run as Decrypt & Extract (download by base name, then decrypt by the file's real extension), instead of sitting in progress forever.

Auto Jobs: navigation hardening — job accepts/completes and SAI server sessions no longer race each other over the network-map endpoint; a timed-out IP/log list fetch is no longer mistaken for an empty list; transient upload/decrypt failures retry next cycle instead of being bugged.

Expeditions — Items: stash cards show craft/use chips, plus a sort bar (name/price/tier/quantity/category/flags/newest) and a "hide craftable" filter with a shown/total counter; view preferences are remembered.
